subject: Databases
title: Transactions Keep Data Safe
description: A quick, practical guide to Transactions Keep Data Safe.

hook.text: Transfer $100: subtract from Account A, add to Account B. If step two fails, step one must undo.

buildup.text: BEGIN starts a transaction. COMMIT saves all changes. ROLLBACK undoes everything since BEGIN.

discovery.text: Inside a transaction, all statements succeed together or fail together. That's atomicity.

twist.text: Long transactions hold locks. Other queries wait. Keep transactions short to avoid blocking.

climax.text: Every production app uses transactions. Without them, partial writes corrupt data silently.

punchline.text: Transactions: all or nothing. No partial writes.

quiz.question: What does ROLLBACK do inside a transaction?
options: It undoes all changes made since the transaction began
